pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude Lombok from the Spring Boot repackaged jar to avoid runtime conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok is a compile-time dependency; including it in the final jar can cause classpath conflicts or bloat.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Guava dependency for utility functions.
Add H2 database dependency for testing or development.
Add Spring Data Redis starter for caching or session management.
Add Commons Pool2 for connection pooling support.
Move test dependencies to a more logical position in the POM.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.after: String token = authService.createToken(loginRequest); HttpHeaders httpHeaders = new HttpHeaders(); httpHeaders.set(SecurityConstants.TOKEN_HEADER, token); return new ResponseEntity<>(httpHeaders, HttpStatus.OK);

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Add a logout endpoint to invalidate the current token.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.after: @PostMapping("/logout") public ResponseEntity<Void> logout() { authService.removeToken(); return new ResponseEntity<>(HttpStatus.OK); }

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update imports to support new AuthService, LoginRequest, and HTTP header handling.
Add enabled field and logic to support account status tracking in UserDetails implementation.
Initialize enabled field from User entity with a default true value if null.
Implement isEnabled() to return the actual enabled status instead of always returning true.
Change user ID type from Integer to Long to support larger ID ranges.
Rename username field to userName and add fullName field for better data modeling.

private String fullName;

private String roles;
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.after:
private Boolean enabled;

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update getRoles method to derive authorities from the new UserRole list instead of parsing a comma-separated string.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.after:
List<Role> roles = userRoles.stream().map(UserRole::getRole).collect(Collectors.toList());
roles.forEach(role -> authorities.add(new SimpleGrantedAuthority("ROLE_" + role.getName())));

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Add Lombok builder and constructor annotations for easier object instantiation.
Extend AbstractAuditBase to inherit common audit fields like creation/update timestamps.
Rename table name from 'user' to 'users' to follow plural naming convention.
Add method to convert User entity to UserRepresentation DTO for API responses.
Ignore userRoles field in JSON serialization to prevent infinite recursion or exposing internal structure.
Refactor exception handler return types from custom ErrorMessage to ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> for consistent API response structure.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.before: public ErrorMessage handleUserNameAlreadyExistException(UserNameAlreadyExistException e) { return new ErrorMessage(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST.value(), e.getMessage()); }
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.after: public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleUserNameAlreadyExistException(UserNameAlreadyExistException ex, HttpServletRequest request) { ... return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST).body(errorResponse); }

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Add new exception handlers for BaseException and MethodArgumentNotValidException to improve error reporting granularity.
Add a consolidated handler for RoleNotFoundException and UserNameNotFoundException to standardize 404 responses.
Add @ResponseBody and @Slf4j annotations to GlobalExceptionHandler to ensure JSON serialization and enable logging.
Remove @ResponseStatus annotation from exception handlers in favor of explicit ResponseEntity status codes.
Remove the empty default constructor as it is no longer needed or supported by the new design.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: The default constructor is removed to enforce the use of the data-carrying constructor.
